name: ControlApp
description: Plataforma multi-app para empresas que conecta gestion documental, auditorias, archivos, gastos, ventas, horarios y talento sobre una base compartida de identidad, permisos y storage.

modules.name: Control Doc
modules.description: Document management with versioning, approvals, and expiration tracking

modules.name: Control File
modules.description: Centralized file storage shared across all platform modules

modules.name: Control Audit
modules.description: Audit and inspection workflows with checklists and evidence capture

modules.name: Control Gastos
modules.description: Expense reporting and approval management for teams

modules.name: Control Ventas
modules.description: Commercial operations: daily cash reconciliation and sales tracking

modules.name: Horarios
modules.description: Employee shift scheduling and attendance management
